summary: Tested portfolio website (frontend + backend). Backend /api/ Hello World and /api/status CRUD pass. All required data-testids present and interactive. Two issues found: (1) document.title is overridden to 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of expected 'Alex Morgan — Project Manager, Test Data Management', (2) /resume.pdf file is missing from /app/frontend/public — link returns 200 only because SPA fallback serves index.html, so the Résumé download button delivers HTML instead of a PDF.

ui_bugs.issue: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'Alex Morgan — Project Manager, Test Data Management' specified in /app/frontend/public/index.html. Likely overridden at runtime by the emergent-main.js script. Set the correct title in a useEffect (document.title = '...') in App.js or Home component to enforce it after the override.

/resume.pdf does not exist in /app/frontend/public. SPA fallback returns index.html with 200, so clicking 'Download Résumé' downloads an HTML file as 'resume.pdf'. Add a real placeholder PDF at /app/frontend/public/resume.pdf.

action_items: Add a real placeholder /app/frontend/public/resume.pdf so the Résumé download button delivers a PDF instead of index.html.
Force document.title = 'Alex Morgan — Project Manager, Test Data Management' via useEffect in App/Home (current <title> in index.html is overridden by emergent-main.js).
critical_code_review_comments: Hero href '/resume.pdf' will be served by SPA fallback when file is absent; add the asset or guard with a missing-file message.
Title set in index.html is being overridden at runtime; set it imperatively in React for reliability.
Backend untouched from template; CORS uses '*' which is acceptable for a static portfolio but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: TEST_pytest_client status_check inserted into MongoDB by test_status_create_and_get.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sections render with all required data-testids; nav scroll, mobile drawer, and testimonial carousel cycle correctly (01/03 -> 02/03 -> 01/03). No console errors. Verified at 1440 and 390 widths. Only two remaining gaps: document title override and missing /resume.pdf asset.
rca of the issue: Title: index.html sets correct <title> but emergent-main.js (loaded after) sets a generic title — needs imperative document.title set in React. Resume: file simply missing in public/, SPA index fallback masks the 404 making the bug silent.
